final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing character illustration for an ancient Chinese-style game splash art.

Style/medium: needs a "mysterious Oriental" (古风) aesthetic with ethereal immortal-fairy quality — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include flowing drapery and dynamic movement in the figure
Subject: must include a woman wearing 汉服 playing a guqin (古琴)
Scene/backdrop: must include a bamboo forest with moonlight filtering through leaves
Lighting/mood: needs moonlit dappled light atmosphere with ethereal, transcendent (仙气) feeling — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an ancient Chinese direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs flowing fabric treatment — exact sheen and weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the bamboo forest setting and moonlight dappled shadows
Avoid:
